# Checklist: User Experience
<!-- Generated by /speckit.checklist -->
<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->

## Transaction Editing (CLR-003)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK043 | Edit button placement — is it alongside the delete button in TransactionCard? Or in the expanded details? Spec doesn't define placement. | [feedback] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK044 | Edit dialog pre-population — amount should display as EUR (divided by 100), not raw cents. Verify formatting matches creation dialog. | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-013 | [ ] |
| CHK045 | Edit dialog title — should change from "New Transaction" to "Edit Transaction" when in edit mode. | [feedback] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK046 | After successful edit — does the dialog close? Does the transaction list refresh? User should see updated values immediately. | [feedback] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK047 | Edit button visibility — only shown when currentUserId === creditor_id. Non-creditors should not see the button at all (not just disabled). | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-003 | [ ] |

## Group Deletion (CLR-004)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK048 | Confirmation dialog — must clearly communicate the destructive nature. Should show group name and what will be lost (transactions, debts). | [feedback] | CLR-004 | [ ] |
| CHK049 | After deletion — user should be navigated away from the group page (to group list). What if another user has the group open? They'll get 404 on next API call. | [error-states] | CLR-004 | [ ] |
| CHK050 | Delete button placement — where on GroupPage? Header toolbar, settings area, or within a menu? Should be discoverable but not easy to accidentally click. | [feedback] | CLR-004 | [ ] |

## Profile Editing (CLR-005)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK051 | UserEditDialog — should pre-populate nickname from current user context. Password field should be empty (not pre-filled with dots). | [feedback] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK052 | After profile update — should the user context be refreshed so the header shows the new nickname immediately? | [feedback] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK053 | Password change feedback — if password is changed successfully, should user be notified? Or silently accept? Current app has no success notifications. | [feedback] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK054 | Loading states — all new dialogs (edit transaction, delete group, edit profile) should show loading spinner during API calls and disable submit button. Match existing TransactionCreationDialog pattern. | [feedback] | CLR-003, CLR-004, CLR-005 | [ ] |
